summary: V2 frontend testing complete. All 17 features tested and working correctly. Home page loads with Libre Baskerville + Outfit fonts, packages grid shows 4 packages + Custom Plan card, filters work correctly (duration single-select, type multi-select), currency toggle persists to localStorage, package detail pages render with hero/itinerary/included sections, sticky CTA appears after 500px scroll, FAQ accordion works, Why Book Direct section displays 3 benefit cards, invalid slug shows fallback, backend API still functional.
context_for_next_testing_agent: V2 features fully tested: (1) Package filter bar by duration + style - working, (2) Day-by-day expandable itinerary accordion - working with single collapsible, (3) What's Included vs Extras checklist - working with correct styling, (4) Sticky Book This CTA - appears after 500px scroll, (5) Why Book Direct section - 3 benefit cards + dark CTA strip, (6) FAQ section - 6 items with Shadcn accordion, (7) Currency toggle USD/GBP/EUR - persists to localStorage. All 4 packages (real-sri-lanka, hidden-lanka, slow-and-savour, quick-escape) + Custom Plan card working. Invalid slug fallback working. Backend POST /api/trip-inquiries verified.

features_tested.home_page_loads: PASS - No console errors, fonts applied correctly
features_tested.filter_duration_3_5: PASS - Shows Quick Escape + Custom Plan only
features_tested.filter_duration_9_plus: PASS - Shows Real Sri Lanka, Hidden Lanka + Custom Plan
features_tested.filter_type_couples: PASS - Filters correctly, toggle off restores all
features_tested.currency_toggle_persistence: PASS - USD/GBP/EUR updates prices, persists after reload
features_tested.package_detail_hero: PASS - Title, label, duration, price in selected currency
features_tested.whats_included_section: PASS - Two columns with correct styling
features_tested.sticky_book_this: PASS - Appears after 500px scroll with price + CTA
features_tested.currency_toggle_detail_page: PASS - Updates hero AND sticky prices
features_tested.why_book_direct_section: PASS - 3 benefit cards + dark CTA strip
features_tested.faq_section: PASS - 6 items, accordion expands on click
features_tested.custom_plan_card_scroll: PASS - Scrolls to Trip Builder section
features_tested.invalid_slug_fallback: PASS - Shows 'Package not found' with back button
